roa.docketEntryComment: SENT FILE TO CJC-CCC FOR 08-11-15 APPEARANCE
/CAL: TO BE HEARD WITH #16012293/X: THERE IS A CHANGE OF PLEA AND SENTENCEIN #16012293/CTORD:PROBATION IN #2487298 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/

/CAL:TRAILING 16012293/DAWT/X:CAD TAPE IS RELEASED TO DPD WITH THE PEOPLE'S STIPULATION UNDER CHAIN OFCUSTODY,/X:RECORD FROM KING AMERICAN AMBULANCEIS RELEASED TO THE PEOPLE WITH STIPULATION,/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/X:CRTORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6 FOR MBHC/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:08-12-16/CONTD:RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/X:HEARING DATE OF 08-12-16 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL:RESTITUTION DETERMINATION/DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: NO RESTITUTION AT THISTIME,  PEOPLE WILL ADD BACK TO CALENDAR IF THERE IS RESTITUTION/

/TWS/CH2 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 11D   /CTS 11   /VF2 150/PROBREVFN/COA 40/CNA/COLLECT/X:DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTIUTION IN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED, THE PEOPLE WILL DETERMINE RESTITUTION AMOUNT, RESTITUTION TO TARA ESHGHI/CONTD:THE PEOPLE TO DETERMINE RESTITUTION/DAWF/SAORD/DEF:IS ORDERED TO STAY OUT OF AND AWAY FROM FLEET WOOD, 839 LARKIN ST, SF, CA 94109/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HAL

/CAL PTC & PC 4011,6 REPORT/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPAINT TO ADD COUNT 9, PC 490,2, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2 & 9/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/VD:TRIAL/REMA/
/CAL:TO SET/DAWT/LD:09-16-15/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:08-24-15/CONTD:RECEIPT OF 4011,6PCREPORT & PRETRIAL, TRIAL/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/OR/SA1:TARA ESHHGI/X:STAY AWAY FROM LISTED PERSONBY 100 YARDS/SAORD/CONTD:CJC ASSESSMENT/DOP/
/CAL:DA MTR HEAIRNG/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 18/TRANS 18:FORTHWITH FOR PLEA/
/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/CO:07-26-16 DATE STANDS IN DEPT 50/
